name: pycut
description: AI-powered video clipping CLI. Transcribes media, extracts highlights via LLM, exports subtitles/timelines/burned-in video.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/cli.js --banner="#!/usr/bin/env node" && bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outfile=dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/cli.js
